Sicily, 2 Litrai, c. 214-212 BC, Morgantina, Pedigree, Silver, NGC, Ch AU★
Laureate head of Zeus right, Soldier on horseback galloping right, holding couched spear; above, monogram., Graded NGC Ch AU★ : 5/5 Surface: 5/5. Fine style. In the name of the Siceliotes.
Extremely Rare! Remarkable iridescent patina. Ex. Hirsch Nachf. 203, Munich 1999, n° 108 and Hirsch Nachf. 208, Munich 2000, n° 1547 sales. From the Dr. Guy Sylvain Paul Bastin Collection, ΣIKEΛIΩTAN
